title: Baseline Shader
description: An enhanced vanilla shaderpack with colored lighting
body:
![BASELINE BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9facfd7e141a0fd20f728156ee6fec833f55c393_0.webp)

# BASELINE SHADER

Baseline Shader is a lightweight shaderpack designed to enhance visual immersion without straying far from the vanilla aesthetics.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/s9iXXX-PmSg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
  <summary>JoaquiX Note:</summary>
It's just my first shaderpack, it might be unstable in its current state.
With my current knowledge I only intend to make a shaderpack that's Vanilla Like.
</details>

### Added:
- Shadows
- Subsurface Scattering
- Auto Exposure
- Border Fog
- Atmospheric Fog
- Bloom
- Depth Of Field
- Motion Blur
- Bloom Based Colored Lighting
- Health Based Fisheye Effect
- Health Vignette
- Lottes Tonemap
- Nether Dimension Support
- End Dimension Support

![shader ON/OFF comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c877db0332d391418f823daab283b3ae2d334ef4.jpeg)

![shader ON/OFF comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f5f6dbe3589b551802c12a12c1524cb021dae4.jpeg)

*This shader does not support OptiFine. It relies on Iris(1.7+) exclusive features for light detection and bloom-based colored lighting.*
